devices.name: OnePlus 13T
devices.description: Daily driver with an incredible camera system and blazing-fast performance. Handles everything from development work to mobile gaming.

devices.name: OnePlus Buds Pro 3
devices.description: Noise-cancelling earbuds with rich sound quality and seamless multipoint connection across all my devices.

devices.name: MacBook Pro 14" M4 Pro
devices.description: My primary development machine. Compiles code in seconds and handles multiple Docker containers with ease.

devices.name: iPad Air M2
devices.description: Perfect for note-taking during meetings, reading technical docs, and sketching architecture diagrams on the go.

devices.name: AirPods Pro 2
devices.description: Always in my ears during deep work sessions. The noise cancellation is a game-changer for focus.

devices.name: GL-MT3000
devices.description: Travel router running custom OpenWrt with WireGuard VPN. Essential for secure connections on the road.

devices.name: Sony WH-1000XM5
devices.description: My go-to headphones for flights and open-plan offices. The comfort level lets me wear them all day.

devices.name: FiiO KA5
devices.description: USB DAC/amp that drives my IEMs with crystal-clear audio. Noticeable upgrade over built-in headphone jacks.
